title: Dash Mace by HexaFoxx
description: Dash mace is a plugin designed to create a unique experience, dash mace allows you to dash upon clicking your offhand bind, and leap 10 blocks approximately.
body:
⚡ Dash Mace
High-Mobility Combat & Traversal

Tired of the standard Mace feeling too heavy? Dash Mace is a lightweight utility plugin that adds a specialized mobility variant of the Mace. Perfect for high-stakes PvP or rapid world exploration, this plugin rewards timing and skill with a powerful forward-launch mechanic.

The Ability: Forward Dash
The core of this plugin is the Dash ability. It allows you to close the gap on enemies or escape tight situations instantly.

How to Trigger: Hold the Dash Mace in your Main Hand and press your Offhand Key.

Distance: Launches the player 10 blocks in the direction they are looking.

Cooldown: 15 Seconds.

UI: A custom BossBar will appear at the top of your screen to track your cooldown. It is only visible to the player using the ability, ensuring your screen stays clean.

Crafting & Acquisition
You can obtain the Dash Mace through a custom crafting recipe or via admin commands. Each Dash Mace comes pre-enchanted with Wind Burst I and a custom, non-italicized name.

Admin Command:

/dashmace <player> — Gives the specified player a Dash Mace.

Permission: dashmace.admin
